sweet: Never have I ever …reread our old messages just to smile.
Never have I ever …bragged about you to someone who didn't ask.
Never have I ever …kept a tiny souvenir from one of our first dates.
Never have I ever …practiced saying something important to you in the mirror.
Never have I ever …fallen asleep on a call with you on purpose.
Never have I ever …taken a photo of something just because it reminded me of you.
Never have I ever …listened to 'our song' on repeat when we were apart.
Never have I ever …smiled at my phone in public because of you.
Never have I ever …planned a surprise for you months in advance.
Never have I ever …teared up thinking about our future.
Never have I ever …saved one of your voice notes to keep forever.
Never have I ever …written you a message and deleted it because it felt too cheesy.
Never have I ever …told my family about you before you knew.
Never have I ever …walked slower on purpose to make a moment with you last.
Never have I ever …pretended to like a food because you cooked it.
Never have I ever …watched you sleep and felt ridiculously lucky.
Never have I ever …worn something specific because I know you love it on me.
Never have I ever …kept a screenshot of one of your sweetest texts.
Never have I ever …imagined our wedding (or something like it).
Never have I ever …learned something new just to impress you.
Never have I ever …missed you five minutes after you left.
Never have I ever …doodled or typed your name absentmindedly.
Never have I ever …recognized your laugh from another room and smiled.
Never have I ever …thanked the universe (or whoever) for the day we met.
Never have I ever …felt proud just standing next to you.
Never have I ever …memorized a tiny detail about you that you've never noticed.
Never have I ever …replayed our first kiss in my head.
Never have I ever …kept one of your hoodies/shirts longer than I admitted.
Never have I ever …planned my day around seeing you for ten minutes.
Never have I ever …said 'I love you' out loud when you couldn't hear it.
playful: Never have I ever …stalked your old photos way back — and panicked about liking one.
Never have I ever …pretended not to hear you so you'd come closer.
Never have I ever …eaten your leftovers and blamed nobody.
Never have I ever …checked myself out in the mirror before you arrived.
Never have I ever …lied about liking one of your playlists.
Never have I ever …faked being asleep to avoid deciding what to watch.
Never have I ever …practiced a joke before telling it to you.
Never have I ever …let you win an argument I was definitely winning.
Never have I ever …secretly rated your cooking out of ten.
Never have I ever …used your shampoo and denied it.
Never have I ever …blamed the pet (or the neighbors) for something I did.
Never have I ever …screenshotted our chat to ask a friend for advice.
Never have I ever …gotten jealous of a fictional character you fancy.
Never have I ever …pretended to know a film just to seem cultured.
Never have I ever …rehearsed how I'd introduce you before you met my friends.
Never have I ever …worn your clothes while you were away.
Never have I ever …hidden the last snack so I wouldn't have to share.
Never have I ever …voted for myself as the funnier one in this couple.
Never have I ever …made up a couple's nickname for us I never dared to use.
Never have I ever …judged one of your exes from afar. Thoroughly.
Never have I ever …let you believe a compliment was spontaneous. It was rehearsed.
Never have I ever …tested whether you'd notice a haircut. You didn't.
Never have I ever …exaggerated a story to make us sound cooler.
Never have I ever …kept a mental list of things you always lose.
Never have I ever …danced ridiculously when home alone to a song you hate.
Never have I ever …been petty about who said 'good morning' first.
Never have I ever …pretended my phone died to finish a nap.
Never have I ever …secretly loved when you got a little jealous.
Never have I ever …used puppy eyes on you knowing EXACTLY what I was doing.
Never have I ever …claimed a restaurant find that was 100% your idea.
spicy: Never have I ever …thought about you at a very inappropriate time of day.
Never have I ever …sent you a message I'd die if anyone else read.
Never have I ever …picked an outfit specifically to be taken off.
Never have I ever …daydreamed about a place we definitely shouldn't try.
Never have I ever …been distracted all day by something you did that morning.
Never have I ever …invented an excuse to leave a party early with you.
Never have I ever …woken you up for reasons that were not an emergency.
Never have I ever …had a dream about you I never told you about.
Never have I ever …gotten flustered just from your voice on a call.
Never have I ever …thought about you during a workout. For motivation.
Never have I ever …wanted to kiss you mid-argument.
Never have I ever …kept a mental highlight reel of us.
Never have I ever …planned a whole evening around one specific moment.
Never have I ever …been tempted to text you something bold at work.
Never have I ever …found you unfairly attractive doing something mundane.
Never have I ever …wished a movie scene was us.
Never have I ever …lost track of a conversation because of your hands.
Never have I ever …counted down the hours until we'd be alone.
Never have I ever …whispered something to you in public I shouldn't have.
Never have I ever …taken a photo for you I triple-checked before sending.
Never have I ever …been very glad the walls don't talk.
Never have I ever …replayed one specific night more times than I'll admit.
Never have I ever …wanted you the second you walked in the door.
Never have I ever …made a promise for later in the middle of a boring event.
Never have I ever …been caught staring. Zero regrets.
Never have I ever …turned a goodnight kiss into a very late night.
Never have I ever …thought 'we should do that again' during breakfast.
Never have I ever …picked the back row for reasons.
Never have I ever …had to change the subject because of where my mind went.
Never have I ever …known EXACTLY what your look meant from across the room.
